query:
INSERT INTO credit_accounts (account_id, available_nmc)
           VALUES ($1, $2)
           ON CONFLICT (account_id) DO UPDATE
             SET available_nmc = credit_accounts.available_nmc + $2,
                 escrowed_nmc  = GREATEST(0, credit_accounts.escrowed_nmc - $2),
                 updated_at    = now()
